description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed for cold urban weather, featuring a long, hooded coat layered over a high-collared inner garment. The coat is buttoned and extends to mid-thigh, with visible seam and pocket details, and the hood is worn up over the head. The individual wears fitted pants tucked into sturdy, lace-up boots with thick soles, suitable for walking on city streets. His hands are gloved, and a scarf or face covering conceals the lower half of his face, leaving only the eyes and forehead exposed. The overall appearance is practical and protective, with a focus on warmth and anonymity. The figure stands upright, with arms slightly out to the sides and fingers relaxed.
description: An adult male pedestrian in a hooded coat, gloves, and boots, with a scarf covering the lower face, dressed for cold urban weather.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded coat, scarf covering the face, gloves, and boots, with the figure standing upright and facing forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the layered coat, and the thick boots, with the scarf wrapping around the face.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hooded coat, the straight posture, and the boots, with arms slightly out to the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coat's length, the scarf, and the boots, with the head slightly turned.
attribute_clothing_type: long hooded winter coat, high-collared inner garment, fitted pants, gloves, scarf or face covering
